channel.title: Comments on: Shipyard Brewing Company – Pumpkinhead Ale, Ep. 79
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: WebBrewMaster
item.dc:creator: WebBrewMaster
item.description: Liquor store called "Smoke and Tobacco" (S&T) in Vinings (northwest Atlanta) had it last weekend. Pricey, and only for a four-pack if I recall correctly. It was pretty good but still would take Post Road Pumpkin Ale or Shipyard's over it (Buffalo Bill's is damn good too).
item.content:encoded: Liquor store called “Smoke and Tobacco” (S&T) in Vinings (northwest Atlanta) had it last weekend. Pricey, and only for a four-pack if I recall correctly. It was pretty good but still would take Post Road Pumpkin Ale or Shipyard’s over it (Buffalo Bill’s is damn good too).

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Pink, don't look so enthusiastic about another pumpkin brew.
item.content:encoded: Pink, don’t look so enthusiastic about another pumpkin brew.

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: I've never seen the Weyerbacher pumpkin in Georgia, but I'm moving to Ft Worth Texas soon, maybe I'll see it there. I like the sweeter pumpkin beers, although I couldn't drink to many of them.
item.content:encoded: I’ve never seen the Weyerbacher pumpkin in Georgia, but I’m moving to Ft Worth Texas soon, maybe I’ll see it there. I like the sweeter pumpkin beers, although I couldn’t drink to many of them.

item.title: By: Keggy
item.dc:creator: Keggy
item.description: Dogfish Head Punkin Ale! I have a 1/2 keg and it's all mine. Yippie!
item.content:encoded: Dogfish Head Punkin Ale! I have a 1/2 keg and it’s all mine. Yippie!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
I love a good pumpkin beer like Paul. My favorite is Weyerbacher Imperial Pumpkin. When I had this beer last year I thought it tasted exactly like a pumpkin pie. That reminds me I need to go to the store to buy some!
Always enjoying!
item.content:encoded:
I love a good pumpkin beer like Paul. My favorite is Weyerbacher Imperial Pumpkin. When I had this beer last year I thought it tasted exactly like a pumpkin pie. That reminds me I need to go to the store to buy some!

Always enjoying!

item.title: By: Kendra Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra Eggleton
item.description: Great views, make our mouth water, Thanks Guys!
item.content:encoded: Great views, make our mouth water, Thanks Guys!
